instructions.name: add_guardian
docs: Registers a new guardian and updates the M-of-N threshold.

instructions.name: anomaly_flag
docs: Any active guardian may call this when the owner's silence exceeds the
statistically expected interval. Emits an on-chain signal without
triggering inheritance.

instructions.name: check_in
docs: Owner proves they are alive. Resets the inactivity clock, updates the
statistical model, and clears any active anomaly flag.

instructions.name: claim_inheritance
docs: The beneficiary calls this after the vault is triggered to receive all
lamports. Closes the activity account simultaneously.

instructions.name: close_orphaned_covenant
docs: Recovers rent from a CovenantAccount PDA that became permanently
unexecutable when the vault was triggered.

instructions.name: close_vault
docs: Closes the vault and returns all lamports to the owner.
Requires `deposited_lamports == 0` and `is_triggered == false`.

instructions.name: configure_threshold
docs: Updates the inactivity threshold on an existing vault.
Resets progressive warning flags so the watcher recalculates milestones.

instructions.name: create_covenant
docs: Opens a new covenant. The calling guardian is automatically the first
signer. Other guardians call `guardian_sign` to add their signatures.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Transfers lamports from the owner into the vault PDA.

instructions.name: emergency_sweep
docs: Executes an approved EmergencySweep covenant. Transfers all vault
lamports to the beneficiary immediately.

instructions.name: execute_covenant
docs: Executes a BeneficiaryChange or GuardianRemoval covenant after the
required signatures and timelock have been satisfied.

instructions.name: guardian_sign
docs: Adds a guardian's signature to an open covenant.

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Creates a new VaultAccount and ActivityAccount for the caller.
`vault_index` allows one owner to maintain multiple vaults.
`inactivity_threshold_slots` defaults to the protocol minimum if 0.

instructions.name: remove_guardian
docs: Phase 1: initiates the removal timelock for a guardian.
Phase 2: finalises the removal after the timelock has elapsed.
Calling this instruction twice (once per phase) is intentional.

instructions.name: trigger_inheritance
docs: Permissionless. Anyone may call this once the inactivity threshold is
crossed. Flips `vault.is_triggered` to true.

errors.name: UnauthorisedOwner
errors.msg: Only the vault owner can perform this action.

errors.name: UnauthorisedGuardian
errors.msg: Only an active guardian of this vault can perform this action.

errors.name: UnauthorisedBeneficiary
errors.msg: Only the vault beneficiary can claim.

errors.name: VaultAlreadyTriggered
errors.msg: The vault has already been triggered for inheritance.

errors.name: VaultNotTriggered
errors.msg: The inheritance threshold has not been reached yet.

errors.name: VaultAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: The vault has already been claimed.

errors.name: VaultAlreadySwept
errors.msg: The vault has already been emergency-swept.

errors.name: VaultNotEmpty
errors.msg: Drain the vault before closing it.

errors.name: ThresholdTooLow
errors.msg: Inactivity threshold is below the protocol minimum.

errors.name: ThresholdTooHigh
errors.msg: Inactivity threshold exceeds the protocol maximum.

errors.name: ThresholdNotReached
errors.msg: The inactivity threshold has not been reached yet.

errors.name: TooManyGuardians
errors.msg: This vault has reached the maximum number of guardians.

errors.name: GuardiansStillRegistered
errors.msg: All guardians must be removed before the vault can be closed.

errors.name: GuardianVaultMismatch
errors.msg: Guardian does not belong to this vault.

errors.name: GuardianAlreadyInactive
errors.msg: This guardian has already been removed.

errors.name: NoRemovalPending
errors.msg: No removal request is pending for this guardian.

errors.name: RemovalTimelockActive
errors.msg: The guardian removal timelock has not elapsed yet.

errors.name: ThresholdExceedsGuardianCount
errors.msg: M-of-N threshold cannot exceed the number of active guardians.

errors.name: ThresholdTooSmall
errors.msg: M-of-N threshold must be at least 1.

errors.name: AlreadySigned
errors.msg: This guardian has already signed this covenant.

errors.name: CovenantAlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: This covenant has already been executed.

errors.name: InsufficientSignatures
errors.msg: Not enough guardian signatures on this covenant.

errors.name: CovenantTimelockActive
errors.msg: The covenant timelock has not elapsed yet.

errors.name: CovenantTypeMismatch
errors.msg: Covenant type mismatch for this instruction.

errors.name: CovenantVaultMismatch
errors.msg: Covenant does not belong to this vault.

errors.name: AnomalyAlreadyFlagged
errors.msg: An anomaly flag is already active on this vault.

errors.name: InvalidBeneficiary
errors.msg: Beneficiary cannot be the zero address.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Lamport amount must be greater than zero.

errors.name: SameSlotCheckIn
errors.msg: A check-in was already submitted in this slot.

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this activity record belongs to.

fields.name: checkin_count
docs: Total number of successful check-ins recorded.

fields.name: sum_of_intervals
docs: Cumulative sum of all check-in intervals in slots. Dividing by
`checkin_count` gives the rolling average interval. Using a sum rather
than a running average avoids precision loss from repeated integer
division.

fields.name: last_interval
docs: The interval (in slots) between the two most recent check-ins. Kept
separate so the anomaly detector can compare the current silence against
the historical average without waiting for the next check-in to update
sum_of_intervals.

fields.name: anomaly_flagged
docs: Set to true by `anomaly_flag`. Cleared back to false on every successful
`check_in`. Protected against double-set by AnomalyAlreadyFlagged.

fields.name: anomaly_flagged_slot
docs: The slot at which the most recent anomaly flag was raised. Zero if no
flag is currently active. The watcher correlates notification timing
from this timestamp — overwriting it silently loses the original
detection moment.

fields.name: bump
docs: The canonical bump seed for this PDA.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this covenant acts upon.

fields.name: covenant_type
docs: What this covenant will do when executed.

fields.name: target
docs: Auxiliary pubkey: unused for EmergencySweep (Pubkey::default()), new
beneficiary for BeneficiaryChange, guardian to remove for
GuardianRemoval.

fields.name: signers
docs: Pubkeys of guardians who have already signed this covenant.

fields.name: required_signatures
docs: Minimum signatures required before the covenant is executable. Copied
from `vault.m_of_n_threshold` at creation time so a later threshold
change does not retroactively lower the bar.

fields.name: created_slot
docs: The slot at which this covenant was created.

fields.name: timelock_slots
docs: Additional slots that must elapse after `required_signatures` is
reached before the covenant can be executed.

fields.name: signatures_complete_slot
docs: The slot at which the final required signature was collected. Zero until
the covenant reaches M-of-N. The execution instruction checks that
`Clock::slot >= signatures_complete_slot + timelock_slots`.

fields.name: covenant_index
docs: Monotonic index derived from `vault.covenant_counter`.

fields.name: is_executed
docs: Set to true when the covenant is successfully executed.

fields.name: bump
docs: The canonical bump seed for this PDA.

types.name: CovenantType
docs: Identifies the action that a covenant authorises once it reaches M-of-N
signatures.

fields.name: lamports
docs: Vault lamports transferred to beneficiary (deposited funds + vault rent).

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this guardian is registered to.

fields.name: guardian
docs: The guardian's own wallet pubkey.

fields.name: is_active
docs: True while the guardian is in good standing.

fields.name: added_slot
docs: The slot at which this guardian was first registered.

fields.name: removal_requested_slot
docs: When the owner initiates a removal, this is set to the current slot.
Zero means no removal is pending. The removal can only be finalised
after GUARDIAN_REMOVAL_TIMELOCK_SLOTS have elapsed from this slot.

fields.name: bump
docs: The canonical bump seed for this PDA.

fields.name: threshold_lowered
docs: True when the M-of-N threshold was automatically lowered to match the
new guardian count. Off-chain monitors should alert the vault owner.

fields.name: lamports
docs: Total lamports transferred: vault PDA balance + activity PDA balance.

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that created this vault and is allowed to check in, configure
thresholds, add guardians, and close the vault.

fields.name: beneficiary
docs: Wallet that will receive all lamports once the inactivity threshold is
crossed and the vault is triggered. Can only be changed by a successful
BeneficiaryChange covenant.

fields.name: guardian_count
docs: Number of guardian accounts currently registered and active.

fields.name: m_of_n_threshold
docs: Minimum number of guardian signatures required to execute any covenant.
Invariant: 1 ≤ m_of_n_threshold ≤ guardian_count (when guardian_count > 0).

fields.name: inactivity_threshold_slots
docs: How long the owner must be silent before the vault becomes claimable,
measured in Solana slots (~2 slots/second).

fields.name: last_check_in_slot
docs: The slot number of the owner's most recent check-in. This is the anchor
point for all inactivity calculations.

fields.name: created_slot
docs: The slot at which this vault was initialised. Used for auditing and to
seed the first activity interval.

fields.name: deposited_lamports
docs: Total lamports currently held by this vault PDA. Kept in sync with
every deposit so instructions can read the balance without a full
lamport inspection.

fields.name: covenant_counter
docs: Monotonically increasing counter used to derive unique covenant PDAs.

fields.name: vault_index
docs: The index used when deriving this vault's PDA. Allows one owner to
maintain multiple vaults simultaneously.

fields.name: is_triggered
docs: Set to true once `trigger_inheritance` succeeds. After this point the
owner can no longer check in or modify vault parameters.

fields.name: is_claimed
docs: Set to true once the beneficiary has successfully claimed.

fields.name: is_emergency_swept
docs: Set to true once an emergency sweep has drained the vault.

fields.name: warning_75_sent
docs: Tracks whether the 75% warning event has been emitted.

fields.name: warning_90_sent
docs: Tracks whether the 90% warning event has been emitted.

fields.name: bump
docs: The canonical bump seed for this PDA, saved at initialisation.
